name: Hip Hip Hurray
overview: The story revolves around the lives of 12th grade students of the DeNobili High School and their adventures, their fears and hopes, their relationships and interactions. The story also focuses on challenges faced by youngsters such as dating, drugs, career, etc.

trailers.title: Hip Hip Hurray | Ep.1 | Alisha के नए स्कूल में बन पाए गे उसके दोस्त | Full Episode | ZEE TV
